requirement_topic.en: Integrated power bank electronics and EMC / radio interface controls in Uzbekistan
requirement_topic.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦对集成电子元件移动电源的EMC与无线接口要求
requirement_topic.zht: 烏茲別克斯坦對整合電子元件行動電源之EMC與無線接口要求

summary.en: Power banks with USB circuitry, display logic, and wireless add-ons are reviewed under Uzbek national product control channels, with O’zstandart and sector authorities requiring appropriate local conformity evidence for EMC and radio compatibility based on national implementation references and importer responsibilities. Where a radio interface is present, the national radio regulator requirements are typically enforced through pre-import coordination.
summary.zh: 集成USB电路、显示与无线附加功能的移动电源，在乌兹别克斯坦通常按国家产品控制渠道进行审核，O’zstandart与相关部门会要求基于国家实施文本的EMC和无线兼容依据，由进口商承担对接。若带有无线接口，国家无线电管理要求通常通过进口前协调执行。
summary.zht: 整合USB電路、顯示與無線附加功能的行動電源，在烏茲別克斯坦通常按國家產品控制渠道進行審核，O’zstandart與相關部門會要求基於國家實施文本的EMC和無線兼容依據，由進口商承擔對接。若帶有無線接口，國家無線電管理要求通常通過進口前協調執行。

standards_or_laws: O’zDSt EMC and radio compatibility requirements aligned to international technical references
Uzbek national radio regulation requirements for wireless module and frequency use

summary.en: China applies GB/T 9254.x and GB/T 17618 series for EMC testing in domestic use and SRRC approvals for wireless modules sold in China. These domestic procedures are relevant for technical planning but do not by themselves satisfy Uzbek importer-facing requirements.
summary.zh: 中国在国内销售中采用GB/T 9254.x与GB/T 17618系列进行EMC测试，含无线功能产品还需SRRC型式核准。该流程可用于技术筹备，但不能单独满足乌兹别克斯坦进口商端要求。
summary.zht: 中國在國內銷售中採用GB/T 9254.x與GB/T 17618系列進行EMC測試，含無線功能產品還需SRRC型式核准。該流程可用於技術籌備，但不能單獨滿足烏茲別克斯坦進口商端要求。

gap.en: The gap is primarily regulatory channel alignment. Uzbek import compliance focuses on national authority expectations and importer coordination, while Chinese EMC/SRRC artifacts are domestic by default. Exporters should coordinate a pre-shipment compliance packet with the importer and confirm radio-use limitations before clearance.
gap.zh: 差距主要在监管通道。乌兹别克斯坦更看重国家机构要求与进口商协同流程，而中国EMC与SRRC文件通常属于国内体系。出口商应与进口商共同准备出货前符合性文件包，并确认无线频段限制。
gap.zht: 差距主要在監管通道。烏茲別克斯坦更看重國家機構要求與進口商協同流程，而中國EMC與SRRC文件通常屬於國內體系。出口商應與進口商共同準備出貨前符合性文件包，並確認無線頻段限制。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for products with integrated electronics where Uzbek market control points require importer-submitted EMC and radio compliance evidence.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese domestic market where applicable (EMC testing and SRRC where needed), but domestic certificates are not direct Uzbek market substitutes.

source.publisher: Uzbek national regulator channels and standards references

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Exporters should treat Uzbek EMC/radio compliance as a local importer-facing pathway, with O’zstandart and radio regulator expectations guiding final evidence requirements. China GB/T and SRRC materials are useful technical inputs but typically need Uzbek-side mapping and in-country document handling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 出口商应将乌兹别克斯坦EMC/无线合规视为本地进口商驱动的路径，并以O’zstandart与无线管理要求为准进行证据组合。中国GB/T和SRRC材料可作技术参考，但通常仍需按乌兹别克斯坦侧进行映射与本地化文件处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 出口商應將烏茲別克斯坦EMC/無線合規視為本地進口商驅動的路徑，並以O’zstandart與無線管理要求為準進行證據組合。中國GB/T和SRRC材料可作為技術參考，但通常仍需按烏茲別克斯坦側進行映射與本地化文件處理。
